impact: A fresh intake path still needs MDI patient/case creation and linkage before questionnaire load; that work is already tracked by T-055/T-056 and T-022 now consumes existing server-owned linkage.
resolution: Resolved as stale tracker state. T-055 completed MDI patient creation and DynamoDB linkage, T-056 completed MDI case creation and questionnaire submission without local answer retention, and T-022 now consumes server-owned MDI linkage for the intake UI.
title: [scope] A fresh intake path still needs MDI patient/case creation and linkage before que
